name: How does Siri decide what source to use?
description: Siri favors clear, structured, reliable information, but Apple does not publish a simple public ranking formula.

mainEntity.name: How does Siri decide what source to use?

acceptedAnswer.text: Siri does not work like a traditional citation engine with a public list of ranking factors. In practice, it answers from Apple’s assistants and connected sources, so the strongest signals are clear language, structured information, and reliable third-party mentions that match your official details. The more unambiguous your page is, the easier it is for Siri to associate your brand with the right answer.
acceptedAnswer.description: Siri favors clear, structured, reliable information, but Apple does not publish a simple public ranking formula.
